input_text: Probably Tallinn is in Estonia. John likes some boxers. A boy saw a girl. Gertrude is a cat. The rain continued. The teacher showed the students a large map. Daniel went back to the bathroom. Muggles can not disappear. The city was destroyed. Tom, a friend of Mary, laughed. Mike or Mickey is not female. The cup filled with water fell. Sandra journeyed to the kitchen. The guide offered the tourists tea. Elephants have long trunks and short tails. A man was yellow. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Is the city intact?
